title: Project Lightwell brings open source security into the AI era
summary: Project Lightwell is a 5 billion dollar investment by IBM and Red Hat to secure the open source ecosystem using AI-augmented engineers and a trusted security clearinghouse. It aims to address cyberattacks targeting open source software used by over 90% of Fortune 500 companies.
